overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage transitioning from an overcast daytime exploration of a futuristic neon-lit city center with elevated transit infrastructure to a rainy night traversal through the narrow wooden walkways of Kabuki Shantytown. The clip features high-fidelity cyberpunk architecture, dynamic weather changes, and atmospheric neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with elevated monorail transit

events.description: camera begins panning left while continuing forward movement to focus on the towering cyberpunk buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza while looking up at the massive cyberpunk architecture and neon signage

entered.detail: futuristic elevated transit railway with support pillars crossing the plaza
towering multi-colored buildings covered in neon advertisements and holographic displays
large glowing advertisement screens attached to building facades
gray concrete retaining wall at ground level with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic urban plaza under overcast skies. The camera moves forward through the open space, panning left to reveal massive cyberpunk skyscrapers covered in vibrant neon signage. An elevated monorail track cuts across the middle distance, while the ground level consists of wet dirt and concrete embankments. No other characters are present in this empty city space.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy shantytown alley with wooden walkways

events.description: fade from black reveals nighttime shantytown scene with heavy rain and neon lighting
text overlay 'Kabuki Shantytown' appears at bottom right identifying the location
moving under corrugated metal roofing creates darker shadows and reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: navigating narrow wooden walkways through the rain-soaked shantytown, passing under overhead wires and makeshift structures

notable_agents.action: sitting motionless on a wooden platform overlooking the walkway ahead

entered.detail: makeshift shanty buildings constructed from scrap wood and metal siding
large white satellite dish mounted on the roof of a shack
rusted metal roofing sheets covering the shanty structures
tangled electrical wires crisscrossing above the alley between buildings
glowing skyscrapers visible in the background through the rain
wet wooden plank pathway with puddles reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: Following a fade transition, the scene shifts to a rainy night in Kabuki Shantytown. The camera moves forward through narrow wooden walkways flanked by makeshift shacks with corrugated metal roofs. Overhead power lines crisscross the alley while heavy rain creates reflections on the wet planks. A lone NPC sits on a platform in the distance, and the glowing city skyline is visible through the gaps between structures. The text 'Kabuki Shantytown' appears on screen to identify the location.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate futuristic urban plaza under a heavy, overcast sky. It begins by gliding forward through the wide, empty expanse of the city center, where the ground consists of a mix of wet dirt and concrete embankments. As the camera advances, it pans left to reveal the towering scale of the environment, shifting focus toward massive cyberpunk skyscrapers adorned with vibrant neon signage. The scene then opens further to show an elevated monorail track cutting across the middle distance, framing the stark contrast between the high-tech infrastructure and the vacant plaza below.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the rain-drenched, claustrophobic corridors of Kabuki Shantytown. It begins with a fade into a rainy night, gliding forward along narrow wooden walkways flanked by makeshift shacks with corrugated metal roofs. As the camera advances, the view is framed by a crisscross of overhead power lines and the shimmering reflections of neon light on the wet planks. The scene then opens up to reveal a lone NPC resting on a distant platform, while the glowing city skyline emerges through the gaps between the dilapidated structures. Finally, the location is identified as the camera continues its steady traversal through the atmospheric alleyway.
